name: HBM2 three-call direct transfer
reflection_calls: none; incorrect training examples are stored directly
memory: cosine retrieval over training errors; frozen during test
role: closest minimal transfer of the FLARE perception-pattern-decision pipeline

name: HBM2 three-call concurrent implementation
memory: same training-error memory as V1; batch-level updates
role: engineering acceleration, not a new research method

name: HBM2 reflective memory and probability calibration
reflection_calls: one additional call for selected training errors
memory: structured reflection memory; frozen during test
role: adds explicit Reflexion-style error analysis and threshold calibration

name: HBM2 pattern anchor and balanced dual memory
memory: balanced correct prototypes plus error reflections
role: turns pattern base rates into explicit anchors and asks the LLM for residual adjustment

name: HBM5 with prior-vaccine acceptance proxy
role: expands from two constructs to five observed proxies and three meta-dimensions

name: HBM5 without any other-vaccine history
memory: distilled structured memories; evaluated with and without memory
role: strict leakage-robust version that replaces prior vaccine behavior with preventive engagement
